calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Authority To Convey Community Real Property To Petitioner To Pay For Expenses Of Stephen Lui
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Petitioner.

The Petition for Authority to Convey Community Real Property to Petitioner to Pay for Expenses of Stephen Lui is taken under submission. Ms. Ng is to provide a further supplement by Friday that clearly reflects Ms. Lui's intent and that she is doing this for the sole purpose for Stephen to continue to receive care where he is.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Authority To Convey Community Real Property To Petitioner To Pay For Expenses Of Stephen Lui
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Continued To Oct-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rose Lui.

The Court referred to the Dr.'s letter regarding the six-month prognosis. Ms. Ng stated that she questioned her Client about that, that they want to proceed and that the intention is to take out a loan (she believes an equity line) against the property for funds to pay for Mr. Lui's care. Ms. Ng also stated that Mr. Lui is in a private care facility that will not take public benefits, that they can't take out a loan without his signature and that she can provide specifics as to what the remaining assets are. In addition, Ms. Ng stated that Mr. Lui hasn't received any benefits, but there is the possibility of Mr. Lui being moved to a lesser facility if needed and that the motivation of this is to not have to move him. The Court expressed concern that this is a precursor of moving Mr. Lui and then the funds not being used for him, and read language in the order noting that it indicates that the purpose is to achieve the Parties' estate planning goals, but does not say what that is. Ms. Ng stated that the goal was for Mr. and Mrs. Lui to take care of each other and that she can add language to the other. Ms. Ng is to provide a proposed order that tracks what was discussed and a declaration from Ms. Lui regarding the liquid assets and depletion of the assets. The Petition for Authority to Convey Community Real Property to Petitioner to Pay for Expenses of Stephen Lui is continued to October 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
